title: Chat-extraction triggers: PreCompact + SessionEnd + SessionStart catch-up
description:
FIRST: 'git merge main --no-edit'; verify cmd_init's hook-install helpers + cmd_catchup + the ingest watermark exist.

Wire the chat stream to fire automatically (currently manual kb catchup). Three triggers, all installed idempotently by cmd_init and coexisting with the existing SessionStart + comments UserPromptSubmit hooks:

1. PreCompact hook → INJECT a directive (hook prints context, can't run LLM triage): 'Context is about to compact. Before it does, run the chat-extraction prompt (references/extraction.md Prompt 1) over the recent conversation, propose durable knowledge (propose-only), then advance the watermark.' Agent extracts from live in-window context. Dedup via the watermark so repeated compactions only mine the window since the last extraction.
2. SessionEnd hook → at a clean end, nudge/queue a catch-up so the just-finished session gets mined (transcript-based; agent runs Prompt 1 next session or now).
3. SessionStart catch-up → cmd_session_start (or its background reconcile) ALSO checks the chat watermark and surfaces 'N un-ingested sessions since last ingest — run kb catchup' (currently only staleness reconciles). Git-independent so zero-diff sessions are caught.

Provide hook templates under assets/templates/ (precompact-hook.sh, sessionend-hook.sh) + install logic.

Test:
- fresh init: .claude/settings.json has SessionStart, UserPromptSubmit(comments), PreCompact, SessionEnd — exactly one each; double init no dupes.
- PreCompact/SessionEnd hook scripts emit the expected directive/nudge text when run.
- session-start surfaces un-ingested chat count given a watermark behind available sessions.
notes: 2026-06-15 07:45 - [human] SELF-HEALING BOOTSTRAP (add to SessionStart): since .claude/settings.json IS git-tracked (so SessionStart rides along on clone) but the git post-commit hook is NOT, make the SessionStart hook detect+install the missing .git/hooks/post-commit and create .ingest/ if absent. Net: a fresh clone, after the one-time Claude-Code hook-approval prompt, bootstraps the non-inheritable git hook automatically on first session. Keep it idempotent + silent when already present.
acceptance_criteria: PreCompact (extract-before-compaction directive) + SessionEnd (clean-end capture) + SessionStart chat catch-up all installed idempotently and coexisting; hooks emit correct directives; session-start surfaces un-ingested session count; git-independent
